[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 010011000 3
6 011001111 6
7 001110010 4

01 110101000 4
12 101000010 3
23 110111110 7
34 001001100 3
45 010011100 4
56 001100000 2
67 100011000 3
70 011111100 6

02 100010101 4
13 100000011 3
24 000001101 3
35 100101111 6
46 100000011 3
57 010000111 4
60 000011011 4
71 010101011 5

03 101010100 4
14 010110000 3

61 001001100 3
72 000010110 3
